title: astragalus tephrodes var. tephrodes
intro: Astragalus tephrodes var. tephrodes, also known as a type of flowering plant in the legume family, is native to China. It is valued in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties and is used to enhance the immune system and increase energy levels. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate the production of white blood cells, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Astragalus tephrodes var. tephrodes is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture to promote overall health and well-being.
